changes.text: Added loader bar on top of page content during navigation.
Added on-site statistic.
Added RSS feed.
Use custom svg cursor when drawing for cross-platform visibility.
Added my website button.
Moved footer to bottom of right sidebar.
Added live status indicator to home page.
Added lightbox to inspect website gallery image.
Added moderation system for drawbook submissions. Drawings now require approval before appearing in the gallery.
Implemented responsive design breakpoints to ensure seamless rendering across mobile viewports.
Fixed canvas coordinate calculation mismatch on smaller screens.
Fixed `AudioContext` resource exhaustion on mobile browsers. Implemented a singleton pattern for the sound engine to prevent hitting hardware limits.
Fixed Drawbook undo/redo executing twice per click.
Refactored Drawbook event listeners to prevent duplication.
Project tags are now colorful.
Blog titles now use a slab font.
Added new package highlight js and markdown highlight.
Improved markdown code highlighting in blog and projects frontmatter.
Moving the widget style to its own css file.
Added surf time tracking to the statistics widget to count how long users spend on the website.
Added recent activity widget.
Added latest blogs widget.
Fixed Drawbook color div not persisting after route navigation.
Added featured projects in home page.
Improve clock widget by adding calendar.
Added snow background image for welcome widget.
Improve blogs page style.
Improve blog detail style.
Added drawbook page.
Uses global click listener in route-controller.
Improve project detail style.
Added music player widget.
Fixed DOM reset bug on 404 pages.
Added website to-do list widget.
Added breadcrumbs.
Added header news ticker.
Added clock widget.
Added website statistic widget.
Added flag counter widget.
Added dark mode and light mode support.
Added chatbox widget.
Added changelog widget.
Added clicker widget.
Added Welcome Widget.
Enhanced performance.
Initial release.
